examples: This restaurant is affordable and delicious.
The new phone is surprisingly affordable.
context: The food was really delicious, especially the jjajangmyeon. I really recommend this restaurant, so I'll make sure to share that info with you here. I also met up with another friend for more shopping in Songsu and man, it was packed there. I'm not usually a big shopper but I had a few things that I needed, so I went on a shopping spree. Everything in Songsu feels so trendy and hit and there were crowds of so many young people there. It was a lot of fun and I bought a purse that I'm obsessed with. I was quite busy during this trip to Seoul, but of course I had to make time to eat at some good matcheeps while I was there. I have two places that I really want to recommend. The first one is travel makers. It's an American breakfast spot and you can get a huge breakfast with eggs, bacon, sausage, and pancakes for a pretty affordable price. The atmosphere of the restaurant also really reminded me of home and the best part is you get free refills for your coffee.

examples: Let's just chill at home tonight.
We spent the weekend chilling by the pool.
context: The other place I want to recommend is more of a dessert spot. It's called Asahi Monkey. They sell Asahi bowls with all kinds of delicious toppings like fresh fruit and granola and the owner there was so sweet and she actually lived in Australia which is where she learned about this dessert and decided to bring it to Korea. It's a must eat well in Hongdae. One of the biggest reasons why I went back to Seoul was to film a video with E-Sung Jun. I was so excited and couldn't believe that he reached out to me and invited me to be on his show. Filming with him was such a cool experience. He's really down to earth and chill so I felt very comfortable filming with him.

examples: The prices here are absolutely insane.
context: I was so shocked going out and about in Hongdae because the lines at Olive Young in Daezo and even the pharmacy were insane. All of the lines were out the door. It wasn't a super long trip, but of course I had to catch up with some friends while I was there. I met up with a friend for shopping in Hongdae and we also enjoyed a really delicious meal at a Chinese restaurant there.

examples: This place has a great vibe.
I'm getting good vibes from this restaurant.
The vibe at the concert was electric.
context: I really like the vibe here and there's always so many things to do here on weekends.
